compiled_state.title: check-plugin-self-ref.sh: markdown fix hint missing for SKILL.md contract references
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When a SKILL.md references a contract doc via 'plugins/dso/docs/contracts/...' the pre-commit hook blocks with 'replace hardcoded plugins/dso paths with _PLUGIN_ROOT (scripts) or ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ (markdown)'. The hint mentions markdown but doesn't show the exact substitution pattern. Sub-agents writing contract references in SKILL.md content will hit this and may not know to use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ prefix. Suggestion: add a concrete markdown example to the error message: 'In markdown: plugins/dso/path -> ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/path'.
